rulings.Case Title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ANDREW K MANCHON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Assignment Order And Order Restraining Judgment Debtor And Order Awarding Attroney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 24, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT ANDREW MANCHON'S Motion For Assignment Order And Order Restraining Judgment Debtor And Order Awarding Attorney Fees. MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER AND ORDER RESTRAINING JUDGMENT DEBTOR FROM DISPOSING OR ASSIGNING THE RIGHT OF PAYMENT SOUGHT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION CAN BE BROUGHT PRIOR TO JUDGMENT AND IT IS NOT REQUIRED TO DOMESTICATE THE MATTER IN ANOTHER STATE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS AWARDED ADDITIONAL FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $740.00 FOR THE FILING OF THIS MOTION. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: BURLINGAME INVESTMENT CORPORATION et al VS. HERMAN KWAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Show Cause Hearing Re Contempt By Defendants Kwai, Tana, Chang, Choy And Paquing
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 24, 2011, line 2, Show Cause Hearing Re Contempt By Defendants Kwai, Tana, Chang, Choy And Paquing. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR AN OSC IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANTS VIOLATED THIS COURT'S AUGUST 8, 2008 ORDER BY INTERFERING IN THE PLAINTIFFS' PURCHASE OF STARBLE AND ASSERTING POSITIONS AS OFFICERS AND DIRECTORS OF BIC IN BANKRUPTCY COURT. THE COURT FINDS THAT BY THESE ACTIONS DEFENDANTS ARE IN CONTEMPT OF THIS COURT'S ORDERS AND ASSESSED SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $50,000. MOREOVER, IF THE DFENDANTS AGAIN VIOLATE THE COURT'S ORDER, A SANCTION OF $100,000 AGAINST DEFENDANTS SHALL BE IMPOSED. PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL ARE AWARDED $391,920.30 IN ATTORNEY FEES AND $29,774.05 IN COSTS. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LOUIS NEFF VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Defts To Produce Docs, Provide Supplemental Responses To Doc And Admission Requests
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 24, 2011, line 3, PLAINTIFF LOUIS NEFF'S Motion To Compel Defendants To Produce Docs, Provide Supplemental Responses To Doc And Admission Requests.
